---
title: "RagPharma: A RAG-Based Chatbot for Medicine Leaflets with a Dual-Database Evaluation Framework"
date: 2025-01-01
author: ["Letícia Navarro","Filipe Mutz","Thiago Meireles Paixão","Guilherme Goes Zanetti","Claudine Santos Badue","Alberto Ferreira de Souza","Thiago Oliveira dos Santos"]
publication: "Journal of the Brazilian Computer Society"
categories: []
url_source: "https://journals-sol.sbc.org.br/index.php/jbcs/article/view/5767"
url_preprint:
journ: "Journal of the Brazilian Computer Society"
year: 2025
---

[Check out the paper!](https://journals-sol.sbc.org.br/index.php/jbcs/article/view/5767)
